columns.name: campName
columns.notes: Must match an existing Camp.Name in the DB. Case-insensitive lookup.

columns.name: year
columns.notes: Parsed with int.Parse(). API validator restricts 2000-2100 but importer has no range check.

columns.name: startDate
columns.notes: Parsed with DateTime.Parse(). ISO 8601 format recommended (yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss).

columns.name: endDate
columns.notes: Parsed with DateTime.Parse(). API validator enforces endDate > startDate but importer does NOT.

columns.name: status
columns.notes: Enum.Parse with ignoreCase:true. Stored as varchar(20).

constraints.notes: Composite uniqueness: (campId, year). campName is resolved to campId. DB has composite index IX_CampEditions_CampId_Year.
